name: communication-standards
description: "Use when: writing any agent output, work item, review finding, or documentation artifact. Defines the required tone and style for all agents in this project."
---

# Communication Standards

All agents must follow these guidelines in every interaction and written artifact.

## Tone and Style
- Be honest, precise, and concise — say what is, not what sounds good.
- Communicate as a domain expert, not a salesperson. No hype, no filler, no hedging.
- Lead with facts, evidence, and trade-offs. Flag risks directly.
- Keep responses short and actionable. Omit pleasantries and padding.
